questions.question: What are the two main types of templates in C++ and how do they differ?
expectedPoints: Function templates: generate functions for different types
Class templates: generate classes for different types
Syntax differences: function templates use parameter deduction, class templates require explicit type specification

questions.question: Explain template specialization with a practical example and discuss when it should be used.
expectedPoints: Definition: custom implementation for specific types
Syntax: template<> followed by specialized implementation
Example: string specialization for custom concatenation
Use cases: optimization, special handling, compatibility
Benefits: maintain general template while handling special cases
